special_mechanics.name: Stunt System
special_mechanics.description: Unicycle performs jumping and rotating stunts around 3D axes to accelerate on race/circuit tracks or earn points on stunt tracks. Stunts require landing on wheels to avoid wipeout and speed loss.

physics_values.stunt_types: jumping and rotating rotations around given axis in 3D space
physics_values.consequence_of_failure: wipeout results in loss of accumulated speed

special_mechanics.name: Track Hazards and Obstacles
special_mechanics.description: Various track elements including speed boosts, corkscrews, loops, twists, and jumps affect unicycle movement and racing dynamics.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data extracted from gameplay documentation. No precise physics parameters (velocity, acceleration, gravity values) are documented in Wikipedia source. Gameplay emphasizes stunt mechanics and momentum-based racing rather than detailed physics documentation.
